# Capillary Rise Experiment

**Summary**: An experimental method to measure how fluids move into porous media under the influence of surface tension and capillary forces.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-pratama|PRATAMA, 2023]] performed capillary rise experiments to determine the impact of acid on petrophysical properties.

## Key Results and Findings

- Capillary rise profiles were used to track the movement of deionized water and acidic solutions (pH 2, 4). ([[2023-pratama|PRATAMA, 2023, p. 14]])
